title: Intersection of Parabolas
description: Find the area of the region bounded by the following two parabolas: $y=(x-a)^{2}$ and $x=(y-a)^{2}$.
input: The first line contains a single integer $a$ ($1 \le a \le 10^{18}$).
output: Print the answer to the problem with exactly $10$ digits after the decimal point, using the standard rounding rules.
source: Camp, Petrozavodsk Programming Camp, Summer 2018, Day 1: t.me / umnik_team Contest
